body.title: Fix AR-004: no-hardcoded-instance-refs violations
body.result: AR-004 audit already passes clean (18-file exempt list covers defaults/docstrings); no code changes needed
body.description:
audit_runner.py reports AR-004 failures: hardcoded 'Igor-wild-0001' instance IDs in source rather than using paths().instance_id or env var. Run the AR-004 check to get the full list.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/ (specific files from audit output)
**Design rules:** no-hardcoded-instance-refs — portability requirement
**Scope boundary:** IN — replace literal 'Igor-wild-0001' strings with paths().instance_id; OUT — don't change palace/DB data
**Completion criteria:** AR-004 audit check exits 0
